base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of aquamentus_proto_variant — a character from 1986 legend of zelda. '(Proto)' unused variant — different palette/pose of Aquamentus in ROM not shipped. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: '(Proto)' unused variant — different palette/pose of Aquamentus in ROM not shipped
